title: Solution Architect
description:
**Location:** Gurgaon or Hyderabad

**Role:** Solution Architect – GenAI \& Agentic AI Platform

**About the Role:**

We are looking for a highly skilled and visionary Solution Architect to lead the technical design and architectural direction of AI\-powered enterprise platforms, with a specific focus on Generative AI technologies and Agentic AI frameworks. This role is central to translating complex business needs into scalable, secure, and high\-performance AI solutions that can power next\-generation applications across commercial and operational domains.

The ideal candidate should have a strong background in enterprise\-grade solution architecture, experience with full\-stack systems, and hands\-on familiarity with GenAI tools, orchestration platforms, and multi\-agent systems. The role will closely collaborate with engineering, product, and data science teams to drive innovation and ensure successful platform delivery.

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. Architecture Assessment \& Scalability Planning**

* Assess current platform architecture, including data pipelines, model orchestration, APIs, and integrations.
* Identify bottlenecks and propose refactoring strategies to support rapid scale deployment of use cases
* Define a scalable, modular reference architecture adaptable across brands, therapy areas, and geographies.
* Develop blueprints for horizontal and vertical scaling (compute, storage, model\-serving, agent orchestration).

**2\. Code Governance \& Quality Assurance**

* Act as the gatekeeper of the core codebase, reviewing backend, frontend, and ML/AI components.
* Establish and enforce coding standards (naming conventions, modularity, documentation, and security practices).
* Integrate automated code quality checks (linting, static analysis, vulnerability scanning) into CI/CD.
* Ensure proper design patterns for agent orchestration, RAG pipelines, and analytics workloads.

**3\. Environment Strategy: Dev, QA, and Prod**

* Define and enforce environment strategies (Dev sandbox, QA integration/UAT, Production HA/Compliance).
* Implement CI/CD pipelines with approval gates, rollback strategies, and model/data version control.
* Ensure automated regression, unit, and performance testing in every release cycle.

**4\. Multi\-Cloud Deployment Strategy**

* Own the multi\-cloud architecture (AWS, Azure, GCP) for flexibility, redundancy, and compliance.
* Build cloud\-agnostic infrastructure\-as\-code (IaC) templates (Terraform, Pulumi) for repeatable deployments.
* Optimize cost, performance, and compliance trade\-offs across providers.
* Ensure service portability and interoperability of AI models across clouds.

**5\. Compliance \& Security by Design**

* Enforce adherence to HIPAA, GDPR, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, GxP, and other life sciences regulations.
* Embed audit logging, explainability, and traceability into all AI/ML workflows.
* Implement RBAC, encryption (in\-transit \& at\-rest), and secure key management.
* Build MLR compliance workflows into AI\-driven content/insight pipelines.

**6\. Technical Team Leadership**

* Provide hands\-on technical direction to backend, frontend, data engineering, and DevOps/MLOps teams.
* Mentor engineers and align all technical workstreams to the central architecture blueprint.
* Conduct design reviews, sprint reviews, and retrospectives to uphold architectural integrity.

**7\. GenAI Technology Radar \& Innovation**

* Track global trends in Generative AI, multi\-agent frameworks, LLM orchestration, and healthcare analytics.
* Evaluate and recommend emerging technologies (vector DBs, multimodal models, healthcare\-specific LLMs).
* Champion incremental platform improvements aligned with ciATHENA’s strategic vision.

**Required Qualifications:**

title: Senior Manager - Platform & Architecture
description:
**About the role:**
-------------------


As a Sr. Manager, Platform \& Architecture you will lead the definition, governance \& continuous evolution of the enterprise data architecture vision and roadmap, ensuring strong alignment with business strategy and digital transformation goals. This role is accountable for establishing modern, secure, and scalable data platform architectures that enable advanced analytics, AI/ML, generative AI, and self service data capabilities across the organization.


You will provide strategic leadership in embedding AI into the enterprise data platform, enabling use cases such as predictive analytics, intelligent automation, and generative AI, while ensuring responsible AI practices, model governance, data quality, and regulatory compliance.


The role requires deep expertise in data architecture, cloud data platforms, analytics ecosystems, and platform security, combined with strong people and stakeholder management skills. You will guide the evaluation and adoption of emerging technologies, oversee PoC initiatives, and drive the operationalization of AI/ML and GenAI solutions.


Working closely with data engineering, analytics, AI/ML, security, and business leaders, you will ensure the delivery of trusted, high performing, and future ready data and AI platforms that scale with organizational needs.


**What you'll do:**


### **Strategic Leadership \& Architecture Vision**


* Define and own the enterprise data architecture vision and roadmap aligned with business strategy.
* Establish architectural principles, standards, and best practices across data modeling, integration, metadata, and analytics
* Guide architectural decisions to support scalability, performance, security, and future growth.
* Evaluate and approve new data technologies, platforms, and tools


### **Team Management \& Development**


* Lead, mentor, and manage data modelers \& architects, platform engineers and data engineers
* Set goals, conduct performance reviews, and support career growth and skills development
* Ensure effective workload planning, prioritization, and resource allocation
* Promote a culture of collaboration, documentation, and architectural discipline


### **Data Platform \& Architecture Design**


* Design and oversee end to end data architectures, including ingestion, storage, processing, analytics, and consumption layers
* Define scalable patterns for batch, near real time, and streaming data processing
* Establish standards for data platforms, ingestion frameworks, transformation and modeling approaches, and BI/visualization tools
* Ensure platform reliability, performance, scalability, and cost optimization


### **Platform Engineering, Security \& Governance**


* Architect platforms with security by design, including IAM, RBAC, data encryption, masking, and auditing
* Collaborate with security and compliance teams to meet regulatory and data privacy requirements
* Define and enforce data governance standards, including metadata management, lineage, data quality, and observability
* Support platform monitoring, availability, and operational excellence


### **Advanced Analytics \& Innovation**


* Enable advanced analytics use cases, including forecasting, predictive modeling, and statistical analysis
* Support data science and analytics teams by designing architectures for ML pipelines, feature stores, and model deployment
* Lead Proof of Concept (PoC) initiatives to evaluate new data, analytics, and platform tools
* Assess emerging technologies for scalability, security, integration, and business value


### **Self\-Service \& Data Enablement**


* Drive the self\-service analytics strategy to empower analysts and business users
* Design curated, governed data layers and semantic models for trusted self\-service access
* Reduce dependency on IT by enabling reusable data assets and standardized analytics frameworks
* Partner with stakeholders to align data products with business needs


**Experience you'll need:**
---------------------------


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, or related field
* 10 \- 15\+ years of experience in data engineering, analytics, or platform architecture roles
* Strong experience designing and implementing modern data architectures and cloud data platforms.
* Hands\-on and architectural experience with:
	+ **Snowflake** or similar cloud data warehouse/data lake experience
	+ **Tableau** or similar BI tools
	+ **Fivetran** or equivalent ingestion tools
	+ **dbt** or similar data transformation frameworks
* Proficiency in **SQL, Python, Spark**, and data modeling techniques.
* Experience with cloud platforms such as **AWS, Azure, or GCP**


**Preferred Qualifications:**
-----------------------------


* Experience with advanced analytics, forecasting, and predictive modeling.
* Knowledge of ML/AI platforms and MLOps concepts.
* Strong understanding of data security, governance, and compliance frameworks.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience working in large\-scale or enterprise Data \& Analytics environments.

**Join Us in Securing the World's Data**
----------------------------------------


Rubrik (RBRK), the Security and AI Operations Company, leads at the intersection of data protection, cyber resilience, and enterprise AI acceleration. Rubrik Security Cloud delivers complete cyber resilience by securing, monitoring, and recovering data, identities, and workloads across clouds. Rubrik Agent Cloud accelerates trusted AI agent deployments at scale by monitoring and auditing agentic actions, enforcing real\-time guardrails, fine\-tuning for accuracy and undoing agentic mistakes.

  


**Inclusion @ Rubrik**
----------------------


At Rubrik, we are dedicated to fostering a culture where people from all backgrounds are valued, feel they belong, and believe they can succeed. Our commitment to inclusion is at the heart of our mission to secure the world’s data.


Our goal is to hire and promote the best talent, regardless of background. We continually review our hiring practices to ensure fairness and strive to create an environment where every employee has equal access to opportunities for growth and excellence. We believe in empowering everyone to bring their authentic selves to work and achieve their fullest potential.


### **Our inclusion strategy focuses on three core areas of our business and culture:**


* Our Company: We are committed to building a merit\-based organization that offers equal access to growth and success for all employees globally. Your potential is limitless here.
* Our Culture: We strive to create an inclusive atmosphere where individuals from all backgrounds feel a strong sense of belonging, can thrive, and do their best work. Your contributions help us innovate and break boundaries.
* Our Communities: We are dedicated to expanding our engagement with the communities we operate in, creating opportunities for underrepresented talent and driving greater innovation for our clients. Your impact extends beyond Rubrik, contributing to safer and stronger communities.

------------------------------------------------

Rubrik provides equal employment opportunities (EEO) to all employees and applicants for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability or genetics. In addition to federal law requirements, Rubrik complies with applicable state and local laws governing nondiscrimination in employment in every location in which the company has facilities. title: Senior Software Engineer - AI & Automation
description:
**Description**  

**Position Overview**  

As a Senior Software Engineer, you will lead the design and development of AI‑powered solutions that drive intelligent decision\-making, enhance knowledge automation, and enable next‑generation digital experiences. Your primary focus will be building and integrating advanced AI capabilities \- LLMs, generative AI, semantic systems, and cognitive intelligence \- into enterprise workflows.



Automation will complement these initiatives by helping scale AI adoption and improve operational efficiency. You will also collaborate closely with product partners and vendors to evaluate emerging technologies and shape the strategic AI roadmap.

**Duties and Responsibilities**  

AI Solution Design \& Development


* Build AI\-driven solutions leveraging LLMs, generative AI, RAG pipelines, vector databases, and semantic search.
* Develop intelligent agents, copilots, and cognitive workflows for reasoning, orchestration, and decision automation.
* Implement prompting strategies, model tuning, safety layers, and performance optimizations.
* Integrate models using modern AI engineering frameworks (e.g., LangChain, Semantic Kernel).


End\-to\-End AI System Architecture


* Design scalable backend systems and microservices for AI inference and orchestration.
* Build production\-ready pipelines for data ingestion, experimentation, deployment, and monitoring.
* Make architectural decisions to ensure robustness, security, and engineering excellence.


Intelligent Automation (Secondary Focus)


* Identify automation opportunities that enhance AI workflows and enterprise adoption.
* Build workflow orchestration and cognitive automation components aligned with reliability and scalability needs.
* Integrate AI models with operational systems to deliver end\-to\-end value.


Cost–Benefit Analysis \& Proposal Development


* Conduct CBAs for AI and automation initiatives, including ROI, effort, and impact assessment.
* Create technical proposals, solution blueprints, and value realization documents.
* Provide recommendations on feasibility, risks, and prioritization for planning cycles.


Partner Product Evaluation \& Collaboration


* Evaluate AI platforms, partner offerings, and emerging technologies for ecosystem fit.
* Perform hands\-on assessments of tools, frameworks, and model providers.
* Contribute to strategy discussions and make recommendations on technology adoption.


Collaboration \& Mentoring


* Work with business, product, and engineering teams to translate needs into AI\-driven solutions.
* Mentor engineers on AI practices, prompt design, automation strategy, and system integration.
* Promote best practices and contribute to organizational capability building.


Innovation \& Continuous Improvement


* Stay updated on AI research, foundation models, multimodal systems, and cognitive automation trends.
* Prototype and experiment with new ideas to extend AI’s impact in enterprise systems.
* Continuously refine deployed solutions for performance, accuracy, and reliability.

**Qualifications** **Required Skills \& Experience**

  


* Strong experience building AI\-powered solutions using LLMs, generative AI, NLP, and semantic technologies.
* Expertise in backend architecture, microservices, and scalable system design.
* Strong engineering skills in Python, .NET, or JavaScript with proficiency in APIs and integrations.
* Experience with cloud AI platforms (Azure AI/OpenAI, AWS Bedrock, etc.).
* Skilled in explaining technical concepts to non\-technical stakeholders.
* Experience with:
* Cognitive capabilities (OCR, document intelligence, classification, extraction)
* Process mining or task mining
* Vector databases, embeddings, semantic search
* Workflow engines or automation frameworks
* Product evaluation and partner ecosystem engagement
* RPA tools like UiPath

**Company Overview**  


ResultsCX is a premier customer experience partner to Fortune 100 and 500 companies. We design, build, and deliver digitally influenced customer journeys that achieve the satisfaction and loyalty brands need to thrive and grow, while improving efficiency and reducing costs. ResultsCX’s 30\+\-year track record for reimagining the customer experience to meet consumers’ evolving expectations has driven growth to more than 20 geographic hubs and approximately 20,000 colleagues worldwide. Our core expertise extends to actionable analytics, contact center as a service (CCaaS), and our own SupportPredict AI\-powered digital experience platform. Our strength lies in exceptional individuals working together in a high\-performing, fun culture to deliver next\-generation customer experiences on behalf of our clients.
ResultsCX is an equal opportunity and affirmative action employer and will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected factors under federal, state, or local law.

Innovapptive is a **category\-defining SaaS company** building the world’s most advanced **AI\-powered Connected Worker Platform** for the industrial sector. Headquartered in Houston, TX, and backed by **Vista Equity Partners**, Innovapptive is on a mission to **reimagine how industrial work gets done** — connecting frontline workers, back\-office systems, and assets in real time to drive higher safety, reliability, and productivity.


Our platform is trusted by some of the world’s largest enterprises — including **Shell, Hess, Cenovus Energy, W.R.Grace, Westlake Chemicals, UNICEF, Kimberly Clark, Scott Miracle Gro, and Newmont Mining** to name a few, and across chemicals, energy, mining, and manufacturing industries. These customers have achieved tangible, hard\-dollar results, such as:

* **10× frontline productivity improvements** through mobile\-first and AI\-enabled workflows.

Innovapptive is recognized by leading industry analysts for its differentiated value creation model:

Our growth is backed by **Tiger Global Management and Vista Equity Partners**, one of the world’s premier software investors, known for scaling high\-performance SaaS companies. Together, we are building the next\-generation AI Powered Connected Worker Platform, combining cutting\-edge technologies — SLM’s, Generative AI, Computer Vision, and Intelligent Orchestration — into a unified system that transforms plant operations globally.


Today, with over **300\+ employees across the U.S., India, and ANZ**, Innovapptive stands at a pivotal inflection point: with an ambition to scale to **$100M ARR within the next 3\-4 years** by industrializing every aspect of our product, engineering, and customer delivery systems.

Through their strong interpersonal and relationship building traits they become trusted advisors to our prospects and customers unearthing their key needs and propose the right solution fit through our platforms and solutions.


The role brings exciting opportunities to the individual by providing a platform to be the face of Innovapptive to our clients. The selected candidate will get an opportunity to work as an equal partner along with our expert sales account executives and play an active role in revenue generation for Innovapptive.

* Strong client\-facing communication and inter\-personal skills, with the ability to explain product functionality, technical design and limitations to various levels of prospect/ customer’s organization right from CXO level to Business SMEs, Program Managers and IT Teams

### **Location**: Hyderabad, India

### **Employment Type:** Full\-Time; Salaried

### **Compensation:** Base Salary, Bonus, Stock Options, Medical

Job Description
===============

### **About Us**


Innovapptive is a **category\-defining SaaS company** building the world’s most advanced **AI\-powered Connected Worker Platform** for the industrial sector. Headquartered in Houston, TX, and backed by **Vista Equity Partners**, Innovapptive is on a mission to **reimagine how industrial work gets done** — connecting frontline workers, back\-office systems, and assets in real time to drive higher safety, reliability, and productivity.


Our platform is trusted by some of the world’s largest enterprises — including **Shell, Hess, Cenovus Energy, W.R.Grace, Westlake Chemicals, UNICEF, Kimberly Clark, Scott Miracle Gro, and Newmont Mining** to name a few, and across chemicals, energy, mining, and manufacturing industries. These customers have achieved tangible, hard\-dollar results, such as:

* Over **$40 million in annual EBITDA savings** at a single enterprise.
* **10× frontline productivity improvements** through mobile\-first and AI\-enabled workflows.
* **15–20% maintenance cost reductions** and **significant uptime gains** across plants and sites.


Innovapptive is recognized by leading industry analysts for its differentiated value creation model:

* Named a **Leader in the Frost \& Sullivan Industrial Connected Worker Radar.**
* Featured by **Gartner** in “Connected Factory Worker” research and the **Hype Cycle for Manufacturing Operations Strategy.**
* Cited by **LNS Research** for delivering **3–5× greater value** than point solutions through unified OT–IT execution, AI/vision innovation, and field\-proven ROI.


Our growth is backed by **Tiger Global Management and Vista Equity Partners**, one of the world’s premier software investors, known for scaling high\-performance SaaS companies. Together, we are building the next\-generation AI Powered Connected Worker Platform, combining cutting\-edge technologies — SLM’s, Generative AI, Computer Vision, and Intelligent Orchestration — into a unified system that transforms plant operations globally.


Today, with over **300\+ employees across the U.S., India, and ANZ**, Innovapptive stands at a pivotal inflection point: with an ambition to scale to **$100M ARR within the next 3\-4 years** by industrializing every aspect of our product, engineering, and customer delivery systems.

### **The Role**


The VP of Technology \& Architecture / Chief Solution Architect will serve as the architectural brain trust of Innovapptive’s platform — unifying product architecture across React Native, Full\-Stack (Node \+ Angular), and Integration domains.


Reporting to the SVP of Engineering \& Technology, this leader will define and enforce enterprise\-wide architecture standards, drive AI\-First design principles, and ensure technical consistency, scalability, and performance across every product line.


This is a hands\-on architectural leadership role — equal parts strategist, system designer, and AI champion — responsible for evolving Innovapptive’s platform into an autonomous, self\-learning digital operations network (ION) built on AI Agents, Computer Vision, and Intelligent Orchestration.  

  

**How You Will Make An Impact.**

**1\. Architect the AI\-First Foundation**

* Define and own the enterprise architecture blueprint across mobile, web, API, and integration layers.
* Introduce AI\-native design patterns that embed LLMs (SLMs \+ LLMs), Computer Vision, and Agent APIs into core product workflows.
* Use tools like Cursor.AI, ChatGPT Advanced Data Analysis, and Bolt.AI to accelerate system design, generate reference code, and validate architectural integrity.

#### **2\. Standardize Architecture Across Domains**


* Unify React Native, Full\-Stack, and Integration architectures under a single governance model.
* Define performance and reliability standards for offline sync, data consistency, and error recovery across apps.
* Institutionalize pattern libraries, micro\-frontend guidelines, and integration adapters for SAP, Maximo, Oracle, and SCADA/OSI\-PI systems.

#### **3\. Build Observability and Resilience as a Culture**


* Enforce telemetry\-first architecture using Sentry, LeakCanary, and custom APM dashboards to detect issues before customers do.
* Establish real\-time health dashboards to track crash\-free user rates, sync success rates, and API latency SLAs.
* Lead AI\-driven RCA frameworks that auto\-diagnose and auto\-recommend fixes based on telemetry patterns.

#### **4\. Mentor and Elevate Engineering Excellence**


* Coach Solution Architects, Technical Leads, and Engineers to adopt AI\-First development practices and code review automation.
* Create and govern an Architecture Review Board (ARB) that uses AI agents to validate designs for security, scalability, and compliance.
* Champion a culture of continuous learning through AI tooling, documentation excellence, and cross\-team collaboration.

#### **5\. Drive Innovation and Customer Value**


* Translate customer and market needs into platform\-level capabilities that differentiate Innovapptive in the Connected Worker category.
* Partner with Product Management to prioritize features that amplify AI value creation and reduce technical debt.
* Evaluate emerging AI/ML and Edge technologies for inclusion in the platform’s roadmap.

### **What You Bring to The Team**

* 15 \+ years in software architecture, including 5 \+ years in enterprise SaaS or industrial software leadership.
* Deep expertise in mobile (React Native), web (Angular \+ Node.js), and enterprise integration (REST, GraphQL, MQ, SAP, OSI\-PI).
* Proven experience architecting for scale (\> 10 k users) with high reliability and offline sync resilience.
* Demonstrated AI literacy and hands\-on use of ChatGPT, Cursor.AI, Bolt.AI, Testim, and Sentry for design acceleration and quality assurance.
* Strong foundation in security, DevOps, and cloud architecture (AWS).
* Exceptional written and verbal communication; able to present complex architectural concepts to executives and customers.
* Passion for mentoring, scaling teams, and building “AI First” engineering cultures.

### **Success Metrics (FIRST 90\-180 Days)**

* Enterprise Architecture Blueprint published and adopted across React Native and Full\-Stack domains.
* AI Design Assistant workflow operationalized (Creating \> 30 % faster solution designs and reviews).
* System performance improved by 25 %, measured via telemetry (Sentry \+ LeakCanary dashboards).
* Architecture Review Board live, enforcing standards and AI\-based design validation.
* Zero critical defects in production post release for 3 consecutive cycles.

### **Why does this Role Matter?**

* The VP of Technology \& Architecture defines the technical DNA of Innovapptive.  

As we move from code\-centric to AI\-centric engineering, this leader ensures that our architecture scales intelligently, delivers predictably, and learns autonomously.
* This role is the cornerstone of our transformation from a mobile\-app company to a connected operations intelligence platform that redefines industrial work.

### **What We Offer**

* Executive\-level compensation and equity aligned with strategic impact.
* Opportunity to shape the core technology foundation of a Vista\-backed scale\-up.
* Hybrid work model — Hyderabad or remote with periodic travel to Houston HQ.
* A platform to build the AI\-First architecture that will power the future of industrial work.

**Innovapptive does not accept and will not review unsolicited resumes from search firms.**


Innovapptive is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to a diverse and inclusive workplace. * This role reports to the VP of Technology \& Architecture and partners closely with Product, Engineering, and DevOps leadership to build the MCP (Multi\-Agent Control Plane) — the missing foundation required to scale AI Agents safely, predictably, and at enterprise\-grade performance.
* This is a hands\-on systems architecture role, ideal for someone who can blend engineering depth with architectural vision to build a production\-grade, telemetry\-rich AI orchestration platform.

### **How You Will Make An Impact**

**1\. Architect and Build the Multi\-Agent Control Plane (MCP)**

* Design and implement the MCP runtime that orchestrates communication, state management, and context flow between AI Agents, APIs, and data stores.
* Define the Agent Execution Lifecycle — registration, routing, task planning, handoff, and feedback loops.
* Implement dynamic context sharing and memory management across agents using vector stores and embeddings.
* Ensure modularity and extensibility for future agent families (Planning, Detection, Scheduling, Knowledge).

**2\. Implement Governance, Security, and Observability**

* Build real\-time telemetry pipelines for token usage, model latency, response accuracy, and cost tracking.
* Integrate with Sentry, Datadog, or custom dashboards for full\-stack AI observability.
* Implement security, role\-based access, and human\-in\-the\-loop (HITL) validation for all agent actions.
* Embed governance logic — policy enforcement, version control, and model selection — directly within the MCP.

**3\. Orchestrate Agents and Integrations**

* Integrate the MCP with Innovapptive’s Connected Worker microservices, SAP, OSI PI, and Maximo APIs.
* Leverage frameworks such as LangChain, CrewAI, Semantic Kernel, DSPy, or Temporal.io for orchestration.
* Enable hybrid execution models (on\-prem \+ cloud) with asynchronous message\-based task dispatching.
* Partner with backend teams to establish seamless communication between AI Agents and transactional systems.

#### **4\. Build AI Development Infrastructure**


* Create standardized APIs, SDKs, and templates for new agent onboarding.
* Implement AI Agent CI/CD pipelines integrated into engineering’s existing release process.
* Collaborate with DevOps to containerize and deploy MCP components using Kubernetes and AWS services.
* Build version\-controlled repositories for prompt templates, agent configurations, and orchestration scripts.

#### **5\. Drive Cross\-Functional Enablement**


* Work with the Chief AI Architect and Product teams to align AI Agent design with business outcomes.
* Collaborate with Security and Compliance to ensure auditability and traceability of all AI interactions.
* Mentor engineers on building AI\-first microservices and telemetry\-driven development practices.

### **What You Bring to The Team**

* 6\+ years of software engineering experience, including 2 years in AI Systems, Platform, or Orchestration architecture.
* Strong expertise in AI frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, Semantic Kernel, LlamaIndex, DSPy) and orchestration systems (Temporal.io, Airflow, Ray).
* Solid background in microservices, distributed systems, and event\-driven architectures.
* Familiarity with LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Claude, Azure OpenAI) and embedding pipelines.
* Proficiency in Python, Node.js, or Go; strong grounding in AWS or GCP cloud architecture.
* Deep understanding of AI observability, governance, cost control, and telemetry.
* Excellent system design communication skills and ability to bridge technical and business teams.

### **Success Metrics (FIRST 90\-180 Days)**

* MCP Server live with baseline orchestration, routing, and monitoring.
* Agent runtime integrated with 2\+ Innovapptive microservices and at least one external system (SAP or OSI PI).
* Governance and telemetry dashboard operational (latency, cost, usage, failure rate).
* AI orchestration playbook published and adopted by engineering teams.
* Agent onboarding time reduced 50 % through standard SDKs and CI/CD automation.

### **Why does this Role Matter?**

* This role builds the brain and nervous system of Innovapptive’s AI future.
* The AI Platform Lead transforms fragmented AI initiatives into a unified, observable, and governable platform — enabling Innovapptive’s AI Agents to deliver enterprise\-scale reliability, safety, and performance.
* Without this foundation, AI features remain tactical; with it, they become strategic differentiators.

### **What We Offer**

* Competitive compensation and equity tied to AI delivery and architecture milestones.
* A platform to define the AI orchestration foundation for a Vista\-backed industrial SaaS company.
* Hybrid work model — Hyderabad or remote with periodic travel to Houston HQ.
* Continuous access to AI, MLOps, and orchestration tooling ecosystems.

**Innovapptive does not accept and will not review unsolicited resumes from search firms.**

title: AI Data & Knowledge Engineer
description:
**AI Data \& Knowledge Engineer (Vector \+ Semantic Intelligence)**

### **Location**: Hyderabad, India

### **Employment Type:** Full\-Time; Salaried

### **Compensation:** Base Salary, Bonus, Stock Options, Medical

**Job Description**
===================

### **About Us**


Innovapptive is a **category\-defining SaaS company** building the world’s most advanced **AI\-powered Connected Worker Platform** for the industrial sector. Headquartered in Houston, TX, and backed by **Vista Equity Partners**, Innovapptive is on a mission to **reimagine how industrial work gets done** — connecting frontline workers, back\-office systems, and assets in real time to drive higher safety, reliability, and productivity.


Our platform is trusted by some of the world’s largest enterprises — including **Shell, Hess, Cenovus Energy, W.R.Grace, Westlake Chemicals, UNICEF, Kimberly Clark, Scott Miracle Gro, and Newmont Mining** to name a few, and across chemicals, energy, mining, and manufacturing industries. These customers have achieved tangible, hard\-dollar results, such as:

* Over **$40 million in annual EBITDA savings** at a single enterprise.
* **10× frontline productivity improvements** through mobile\-first and AI\-enabled workflows.
* **15–20% maintenance cost reductions** and **significant uptime gains** across plants and sites.


Innovapptive is recognized by leading industry analysts for its differentiated value creation model:

* Named a **Leader in the Frost \& Sullivan Industrial Connected Worker Radar.**
* Featured by **Gartner** in “Connected Factory Worker” research and the **Hype Cycle for Manufacturing Operations Strategy.**
* Cited by **LNS Research** for delivering **3–5× greater value** than point solutions through unified OT–IT execution, AI/vision innovation, and field\-proven ROI.


Our growth is backed by **Tiger Global Management and Vista Equity Partners**, one of the world’s premier software investors, known for scaling high\-performance SaaS companies. Together, we are building the next\-generation AI Powered Connected Worker Platform, combining cutting\-edge technologies — SLM’s, Generative AI, Computer Vision, and Intelligent Orchestration — into a unified system that transforms plant operations globally.


Today, with over **300\+ employees across the U.S., India, and ANZ**, Innovapptive stands at a pivotal inflection point: with an ambition to scale to **$100M ARR within the next 3\-4 years** by industrializing every aspect of our product, engineering, and customer delivery systems.

### **The Role**


* The AI Data \& Knowledge Engineer will architect and operationalize Innovapptive’s semantic data intelligence layer — building the pipelines, vector stores, and retrieval frameworks that supply contextual understanding to AI Agents and enterprise workflows.
* Reporting to the VP of Technology \& Architecture, this role is responsible for designing the RAG (Retrieval\-Augmented Generation) and Vector Embedding pipelines that connect industrial data (SOPs, manuals, logs, SCADA readings, SAP records) with Innovapptive’s AI runtime.
* This is a hands\-on, cross\-disciplinary engineering role, blending data architecture, ML engineering, and semantic search design to make Innovapptive’s AI Agents contextually aware, accurate, and reliable.

### **How You Will Make An Impact**

**1\. Architect the AI Knowledge and Data Layer**

* Design and implement data ingestion and embedding pipelines to convert structured and unstructured content into vectorized representations.
* Build a unified data schema connecting maintenance, production, and safety data across SAP, Maximo, OSI PI, and SCADA systems.
* Integrate vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, or Chroma) into the AI Platform (MCP) to enable context\-aware retrieval.
* Optimize query efficiency and relevance through hybrid search (semantic \+ keyword) and metadata tagging.

#### **2\. Operationalize RAG (Retrieval\-Augmented Generation)**


* Implement document chunking, embedding, and retrieval pipelines for PDFs, work orders, shift logs, and incident reports.
* Develop automated retraining and re\-indexing mechanisms to ensure freshness of data.
* Collaborate with AI Platform Architect to link retrieval flows into agent orchestration layers.
* Validate precision, recall, and latency metrics for semantic retrieval using real production workloads.

#### **3\. Build AI Data Governance and Observability**


* Define data lineage, quality metrics, and access control for AI knowledge repositories.
* Embed telemetry for data latency, embedding drift, and retrieval accuracy into Datadog/Sentry dashboards.
* Partner with the Chief AI Architect to enforce compliance, explainability, and prompt context versioning standards.

#### **4\. Collaborate Across Product and Engineering**


* Work with Product Managers and Solution Architects to identify key use cases for AI\-driven search and knowledge retrieval.
* Partner with QA to build automated test frameworks for semantic accuracy and retrieval reliability.
* Collaborate with industrial data teams to extract and normalize sensor, historian, and SAP data for RAG integration.

#### **5\. Drive Continuous Innovation**


* Evaluate emerging frameworks for knowledge graphs, embeddings, and contextual caching (e.g., LlamaIndex, LangChain, FAISS).
* Tune embeddings and hybrid retrieval strategies for domain\-specific industrial vocabulary.
* Mentor developers on data preparation and retrieval design for AI\-integrated product features.

### **What You Bring to The Team**

* 8 – 12 \+ years of data or ML engineering experience, with 3 \+ years in semantic search, RAG, or vector database architecture.
* Proficiency with Python, SQL, and frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, or Haystack.
* Hands\-on experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Chroma) and cloud data stores (AWS S3, DynamoDB, Redshift).
* Deep understanding of embedding models (OpenAI, Cohere, Sentence Transformers) and performance tuning for large\-scale retrieval.
* Strong data pipeline experience (Airflow, Kafka, Temporal) and understanding of MLOps fundamentals.
* Familiarity with industrial data (SAP, Maximo, OSI PI, SCADA, MES) preferred.
* Excellent communication and documentation skills — able to translate data architecture into business and engineering language.

### **Success Metrics (FIRST 90\-180 Days)**

* Vector Data Layer deployed with initial knowledge embeddings across 2 core domains (Maintenance \+ Safety).

RAG pipelines operational, delivering* 90 % retrieval precision for selected test datasets.
* Telemetry dashboards live, showing retrieval latency, accuracy, and data freshness.
* Data\-to\-Agent API integrated into MCP and adopted by 2\+ AI Agent families.
* Knowledge Playbook published — reusable design patterns for data ingestion, embeddings, and retrieval governance.

### **Why does this Role Matter?**

* The AI Data \& Knowledge Engineer is the intelligence enabler behind every AI Agent.  

Without a robust, governed, and high\-precision knowledge layer, AI features remain shallow and disconnected.
* This role transforms Innovapptive’s platform into a contextually aware, continuously learning system — where every AI decision is grounded in trusted enterprise and field data.

### **What We Offer**

* Competitive compensation and equity tied to measurable impact on AI accuracy and performance.
* A platform to shape the semantic intelligence layer of a category\-defining industrial SaaS company.
* Hybrid work model — Hyderabad or remote with periodic travel to Houston HQ.
* Access to cutting\-edge AI, data, and observability toolchains for continuous learning and innovation.

**Innovapptive does not accept and will not review unsolicited resumes from search firms.**

title: Azure+DevOps+K8
description:
Bangalore


Azure\+DevOps\+K8



At Capgemini Engineering, the world leader in engineering services, we bring together a global team of engineers, scientists, and architects to help the world’s most innovative companies unleash their potential. From autonomous cars to life\-saving robots, our digital and software technology experts think outside the box as they provide unique R\&D and engineering services across all industries. Join us for a career full of opportunities. Where you can make a difference. Where no two days are the same.
Your Role* Design, deploy, and maintain Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) clusters.
* Create and manage Kubernetes manifests (Deployments, Services, Ingress, ConfigMaps, Secrets).
* Implement autoscaling, rolling updates, blue‑green or canary deployments.
* Monitor and troubleshoot cluster performance, pods, networking, and scheduling.
* Work with Helm charts for packaging and deploying K8s applications.
* Create and maintain cloud infrastructure.
* Ensure infrastructure is modular, reusable, and version\-controlled.
* Manage Azure resources: VNets, Load Balancers, Key Vault, Storage, API Gateway, etc.
* Configure and monitor Azure Monitor / Log Analytics / Prometheus / Grafana.
* Implement observability, alerting, and logging best practices.

Your Profile* Experience in DevOps / Cloud engineering.
* Strong hands\-on experience in Azure DevOps Services.
* Solid understanding of Kubernetes concepts: pods, deployments, autoscaling, networking, ingress, persistent storage.
* Experience with AKS and cloud\-native services.
* Strong IaC experience: Terraform (preferred).
* Good understanding of containerization using Docker.
* CI/CD best practices and deployment automation.
* Understanding of microservices architecture and cloud\-native design patterns.

what you'll love about working here* We’re committed to ensure that people of all backgrounds feel encouraged and have a sense of belonging at Capgemini. You are valued for who you are, and you can bring your original self to work.
* Every Monday, kick off the week with a musical performance by our in\-house band \- The Rubber Band. Also get to participate in internal sports events, yoga challenges, or marathons.
* At Capgemini, you can work on cutting\-edge projects in tech and engineering with industry leaders or create solutions to overcome societal and environmental challenges.
Capgemini is a global business and technology transformation partner, helping organizations to accelerate their dual transition to a digital and sustainable world, while creating tangible impact for enterprises and society. It delivers end\-to\-end services and solutions leveraging strengths from strategy and design to engineering, all fueled by its market leading capabilities in AI, generative AI, cloud and data, combined with its deep industry expertise and partner ecosystem.

title: Domain Architect
description:
We are seeking an experienced and visionary AI/ML Solution Architect to lead the design, development, and deployment of advanced AI and ML systems across the Autonomous Network. In this role, you will play a critical part in driving business transformation through the application of AI/ML and Generative AI technologies. You will collaborate with cross\-functional teams, mentor engineers, and define scalable, secure, and innovative architectures aligned with enterprise goals.


If you have a passion for AI, cloud\-based ML solutions, and driving scalable innovation, this role is for you.


  
* Design and architect end\-to\-end AI/ML system solutions on the Cloud, ensuring scalability, reliability, and maintainability throughout all project phases—from discovery and proof of concept to industrialization, deployment, and ongoing maintenance.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business objectives and translate them into AI\-driven solutions aligned with enterprise strategy.
* Propose, implement, and select optimal machine learning algorithms by leveraging advanced statistical tools and data science techniques to uncover insights and generate accurate predictions.
* Research, prototype, and implement state\-of\-the\-art AI/ML techniques to solve complex business problems.
* Act as a technical leader and mentor to AI/ML engineers across projects, guiding junior engineers in defining robust methodologies and evaluating the most effective technical solutions.
* Define and enforce engineering best practices, coding standards, and scalable design patterns. Facilitate technical knowledge sharing sessions, code reviews, and design walkthroughs.
* Built scalable APIs for real\-time web application enforcement and integrating applications with AI Pipelines. Collaborated with cross\-functional teams to integrate AI\-powered features.
* Prepare technical documentation, including design specifications, test cases, and user manuals.

  
**You have:**

* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or a related field, with overall 8\+ years of experience, including extensive work in the design, development, and deployment of AI/ML systems.
* Strong expertise in machine learning algorithms, with advanced proficiency in Python, SQL, and relational/non\-relational databases.
* Deep understanding of ML, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Large Language Models (LLMs), and applied GenAI solutions.
* Demonstrated experience in designing scalable AI/ML architectures and integrating intelligent systems into production\-ready, cloud\-native applications.
* Strong grip on Kubernetes, Docker, and microservices\-based architecture for deployment and orchestration of AI solutions with practical experience on agentic AI frameworks such as LangChain, CrewAI, or AutoGen.

**Nice\-to\-Have:**

* Prior experience developing AI solutions in the telecom domain, with an understanding of domain\-specific challenges and data environments.

  
**Advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.**Nokia is a global leader in connectivity for the AI era. With expertise across fixed, mobile and transport networks, powered by the innovation of Nokia Bell Labs, we’re advancing connectivity to secure a brighter world.


Learn more about life at Nokia .  

  

  

**Our recruitment process**

We act inclusively and respect the uniqueness of people. Our employment decisions are made regardless of race, color, national or ethnic origin, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status or other characteristics protected by law. We are committed to a culture of inclusion built upon our core value of respect.


If you’re interested in this role but don’t meet every listed requirement, we still encourage you to apply. Unique backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences enrich our teams, and you may be just the right candidate for this or another opportunity.


The length of the recruitment process may vary depending on the specific role's requirements. We strive to ensure a smooth and inclusive experience for all candidates. Discover more about the recruitment process at Nokia .

title: Software Development Engineer in Test
description:
**About the Role:**  

**Grade Level (for internal use):** 08
  
Software Development Engineer in Test
  
  

**The Team:**  

The Quality Engineering team collaborates closely with various Technology Functions and Business units to ensure the quality delivery of our products. Operating in an Agile environment, the team is globally distributed and empowered to drive decisions autonomously. We foster a culture of collaboration, innovation, and continuous improvement. We are committed to enhancing customer experience, facilitating revenue growth, and enabling operational excellence through rapid development cycles while maintaining high\-quality standards.
  
  

**Responsibilities and Impact:**  

As an SDET, you will play a vital role in developing and testing solutions to test applications across Web, API, and Services platforms, while also establishing efficient data comparison methods. Your primary challenge will be to minimize the “time to market” for products without sacrificing quality, leveraging automation and innovative practices, including Generative AI techniques. You will work with a diverse set of technologies and collaborate with various internal teams.
  
  

**Test Design/Execution:** Design and execute detailed manual test cases for Salesforce RCA (Quoting, Contracts), RCB (Billing, Invoicing), and Agentforce AI interactions.

**Data Validation and Agentforce Testing:** Validate data integrity post\-transaction and execute tests for Agentforce use cases.

1 years of experience in Software Quality Assurance or a related field, preferably in a financial technology environment.

Experience with test case management and defect tracking tools (e.g., Jira).

title: Software Development Engineer 4
description:
**Job Title**


Software Development Engineer 4**Summary of the Role**
-----------------------


The Senior Software Engineer is a technical leader and hands\-on architect who challenges the status quo, drives innovation, and shapes the future of our distributed platforms and products. The role demands strong technical depth, architectural vision, and the ability to ideate, prototype, and scale systems to meet evolving business and customer needs.


He/She will be responsible for end‑to‑end architecture, performance, design, and implementation of new features and products built using Java/Scala for real\-time and batch processing. This role also requires identifying and driving NFR improvements, mentoring development teams, and ensuring engineering excellence across the lifecycle.

**Main Responsibilities**
-------------------------

title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend Microservices, Rust (Bangalore, India)
description:
**About Us**:


In today's world, where data spreads across various clouds and devices, traditional security measures aren't enough. Businesses need a dynamic approach to defend against constant cyber threats and ensure agile data security. Fortanix leads the way in data\-centric cybersecurity for hybrid multicloud environments, using advanced cryptography, encryption, and confidential AI solutions.


As data breaches become more frequent and traditional defenses fall short, we focus on data exposure management to keep your information safe. Our unified data security platform addresses vulnerabilities in hybrid multicloud environments, defends against threats, and makes it easier to discover, assess, and fix data exposure risks. Whether implementing a Zero Trust model or preparing for the post\-quantum computing era, we help businesses worldwide protect their most sensitive data, wherever it is.


Our commitment to solving the world’s toughest data security challenges has earned Fortanix multiple Cybersecurity Excellence and Innovation Awards, as well as recognition from industry giants such as NVIDIA, Microsoft, Intel, ServiceNow, and Snowflake.


Our team includes industry leaders and cryptography experts, creating a culture of trust, innovation and collaboration where every voice is valued. Recognized as a Great Place to Work, we're looking for passionate individuals to help us shape the future of data security and work towards a safer digital future.

**Requirements**


We’re looking for a **Senior Software Engineer** to join our Confidential Computing Management team—the group responsible for designing, developing, and deploying our Generative AI platform.


In this role, you’ll design and deploy microservices in a hybrid cloud environment, helping to build a scalable and reliable platform from the ground up. We are looking for someone with a clear vision of what a well\-architected system looks like, and the technical ability to bring that vision to life. We’re seeking someone with a security\- and quality\-first mindset—an engineer who instinctively builds systems that are secure by design, resilient in production, and easy to maintain over time.


This role will ideally be based out of one of our three offices (Eindhoven, Netherlands, Santa Clara, CA USA, or Bangalore, India). A remote option will be considered for the right candidate.

**The Senior Software Engineer** role is responsible for the following:

* Designing and building microservices for our secure Generative AI platform.
* Working closely with the data science team to enhance LLM (Large Language Model) performance through data engineering.
* Working directly with the ML Infrastructure and Platform teams to identify opportunities to further improve and optimize the tools and solutions.
* Applying best practices for security, performance, and reliability.

**Skills/Requirements:**

* At least 5\+ years of professional experience as a software engineer
* At least 3\+ years of hands on experience in Rust (preferred), C/C\+\+, or Go.
* Strong experience in backend development, microservices and building distributed systems.
* Familiarity with CI/CD and deployment infrastructure.
* Experience with cloud technologies such as AWS/GCP/Azure.
* Hands on experience with container technologies like Docker and Kubernetes.
* Has hands\-on experience working with NoSQL databases such as Cassandra, MongoDB etc.
* Proven experience with Linux system programming, builds and deployment.
* A bachelor's or master's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field, or equivalent training or work experience
* Experience in Generative AI (Large Language Models, Multi\-Modal, Large Vision Models) is nice to have.
* Experience with machine learning algorithms and tools (e.g., TensorFlow), artificial intelligence, deep learning, natural language processing or other ML discipline is nice to have.
* Strong problem\-solving and analytical skills
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills
* Strong preference (not required) for someone with experience working with secure enclaves, confidential computing or Trusted Execution Environments (for example: Intel SGX, Intel TDX, AMD\-SEV, Nitro Enclaves, etc).

**Benefits**

* Mediclaim Insurance – Employees and their eligible dependents including dental coverage
* Personal Accident Insurance
* Internet Reimbursement
* Employee Stock Options

*Fortanix is an equal opportunity employer that celebrates diversity and is committed to creating an inclusive workplace with equal opportunity for all applicants and teammates. Our goal is to recruit the most talented people from a diverse candidate pool regardless of race, color, religion, age, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other status. If you’re interested in working in a fast growing, exciting working environment – we encourage you to apply!*

SailPoint is the leader in identity security for the cloud enterprise . Our identity security solutions secure and enable thousands of companies worldwide, giving our customers unmatched visibility into the entirety of their digital workforce and ensuring that workers have the right access to do their job—no more and no less.  



Built on a foundation of AI and ML, our Identity Security Cloud Platform delivers the right level of access to the right identities and resources at the right time—matching the scale, velocity, and changing needs of today’s cloud\-oriented, modern enterprise.  



**About the role:**

As a Staff AI Engineer, you will collaborate closely with cross\-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy cutting\-edge AI solutions with a focus on Generative AI and autonomous systems. This role requires a strong foundation in ML engineering, along with experience building applications with FMs and related concepts such as RAG, fine\-tuning, agents, and distillation.  



**About the team:**

The AI team at SailPoint applies AI and domain expertise to create AI solutions that solve real problems in identity governance. We believe the path to success is through meaningful customer outcomes, and we leverage traditional AI/ML as well as recent innovations in Generative AI and Graph ML to bring our solutions to SailPoint’s core product lines.  



**Roadmap to success:**

**90 Days**

* Deeply understand the SailPoint AI vision and Generative AI initiatives.
* Onboard onto our AI Platform tech stack.
* Develop or evaluate a working prototype of an AI agent using existing models/tools.

* Deliver or contribute to a fully functional GenAI\-powered feature.

* Drive AI innovation by rapidly incorporating advancements in FM fine\-tuning, prompt engineering, agent\-based systems, etc. into our product and platform.
* Establish repeatable frameworks for evaluating GenAI and agent\-based features in production, emphasizing business impact and risk mitigation.
Collaborate with partners to deliver thoughtful integrations between traditional ML and agent\-based systems that provide a seamless and autonomous user experience.  

* 
**Requirements:**

* 8\+ years experience building and deploying ML models in production at scale.
* Recent experience with Generative AI models and techniques, such as LLMs, fine\-tuning, RAG, prompt engineering, guardrails, distillation, and agent frameworks.
* Can\-do attitude with a focus on delivering measurable business impact .
* Strong technical communicator who can convey complex topics to different audiences.
B.S. in Computer Science, or a related field.

Experian is a global data and technology company, powering opportunities for people and businesses around the world. We help to redefine lending practices, uncover and prevent fraud, simplify healthcare, create marketing solutions, and gain deeper insights into the automotive market, all using our unique combination of data, analytics and software. We also assist millions of people to realize their financial goals and help them save time and money.


We operate across a range of markets, from financial services to healthcare, automotive, agribusiness, insurance, and many more industry segments.


We invest in people and new advanced technologies to unlock the power of data. As a FTSE 100 Index company listed on the London Stock Exchange (EXPN), we have a team of 22,500 people across 32 countries. Our corporate headquarters are in Dublin, Ireland. Learn more at experianplc.com.

 **Job Description** **What you’ll be doing**


Experian is driving innovation by delivering advanced solutions that redefine how millions of customers interact with us. We’re seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Development Engineer to help shape our next\-generation Intelligent Virtual Assistant (IVA). In this role, you’ll construct dynamic JavaScript components and integrate them with advanced NLP and ML technologies to deliver agentic, frictionless self\-service capabilities. Your work will directly impact customer satisfaction and operational efficiency, enabling smarter, faster, and more personalized experiences at scale.


This role is ideal for a dynamic individual who excels in a fast\-paced environment and has a proven track record of managing large\-scale projects, collaborating with cross\-functional teams by making data driven decisions

**Key Responsibilities:**

* **JavaScript Development**: Develop innovative, scalable components with JavaScript in a specialized scripting framework.
* **Feature Implementation**: Develop solutions to increase automation and create consumer self\-service capabilities across Experian’s contact center channels.
* **GenAI Coding:** Leverage Generative AI coding assistants to accelerate development, improve code quality, and enhance productivity throughout the software lifecycle.
* **Performance Optimization**: Regularly assess, monitor and optimize the performance of applications, ensuring optimal performance and responsiveness.
* **Continuous Integration**: Implement and maintain CI/CD pipelines to automate the build, test, and deployment processes.
* **Problem Solving**: Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, ensuring the stability and reliability of the software.
* **Documentation**: Create and maintain comprehensive technical documentation for developed features, configurations, and systems.
* **US Partnership**: Operate partially within US Central time zone as needed to ensure appropriate alignment and coordination with the US\-based team.
* **Hybrid Work**: Must be able to work in\-office (Hyderabad) 1\-2 days per week, with remote work for the remainder

**Qualifications and Experience Required:**

* **Core Technical Skills \& Experience:** 2\+ years of JavaScript experience required; *must be expert level in this area.*
* **AWS:** Solid understanding of AWS technologies such as DynamoDB and Lambda.
* **GenAI:** Must have strong and demonstrated knowledge of how to leverage GenAI in accelerating coding and testing (GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, MS Copilot, or similar tool).
* **Communication:** Strong verbal and written communication skills, capable of conveying complex technical concepts to diverse audiences.
* **Problem\-Solving:** Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills with a creative approach to challenges.
* **Teamwork:** Strong interpersonal skills and the ability to work effectively with cross\-functional teams.
* **Time Management:** Excellent organizational skills and the ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously.
* **Adaptability:** Flexibility to adapt to changing priorities and new technologies.
* **Attention to Detail:** High standard for quality and precision in all aspects of work.
* **On\-Call:** Participation in an on\-call rotation is required.
* **Additional Skills:**
	+ Previous experience in IVR and/or NLP development is preferred.
	+ Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and tools such as GitLab CI or Jenkins.
	+ Understanding of microservices architecture and RESTful API design.
	+ Knowledge of security best practices and tools for secure software development.


Why Join Us

* Be part of a market leader in data\-driven innovation.
* Work in a dynamic, fast\-paced environment.
* Contribute to products that improve lives daily.
* Thrive in an inclusive and diverse team.

 **Qualifications** **Qualifications**

* Java Script,
* Troubleshooting
* IVA
* Prompt Engineering
* Softskills

  

**Additional Information**  

Our uniqueness is that we celebrate yours. Experian's culture and people are important differentiators. We take our people agenda very seriously and focus on what matters; DEI, work/life balance, development, authenticity, collaboration, wellness, reward \& recognition, volunteering... the list goes on. Experian's people first approach is award\-winning; World's Best Workplaces™ 2024 (Fortune Top 25\), Great Place To Work™ in 24 countries, and Glassdoor Best Places to Work 2024 to name a few. Check out Experian Life on social or our Careers Site to understand why.


Experian is proud to be an Equal Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer. Innovation is an important part of Experian's DNA and practices, and our diverse workforce drives our success. Everyone can succeed at Experian and bring their whole self to work, irrespective of their gender, ethnicity, religion, colour, sexuality, physical ability or age. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know at the earliest opportunity.


Experian Careers \- Creating a better tomorrow together

title: Principal Search/AI Engineer
description:
**Role Summary**
----------------


We're looking for a **Principal Search/AI Engineer** to join our team of search experts and serve as technical lead on large\-scale search modernization projects and programs for Fortune\-1000 clients. You will collaborate with our established search practice to design, build, and optimize AI\-powered search platforms that deliver rich content and product discovery experiences. In this role, you'll drive technical excellence across multi\-year digital transformation initiatives, lead solution architecture, and mentor engineering teams while implementing cutting\-edge search solutions enhanced with AI and agentic capabilities for our retail, e\-commerce, and enterprise clients.

 **Responsibilities**  

**Key Responsibilities**
------------------------

**Search Platform Leadership** • Lead technical architecture and strategy for complex search modernization programs spanning multiple years and teams • Drive end\-to\-end ownership of Lucene\-based search platforms (Solr/Elasticsearch/OpenSearch) including schema design, index pipelines, scaling, and monitoring • Architect high\-throughput, low\-latency Java services that expose search functionality via REST/gRPC APIs • Design and implement advanced search relevance strategies including semantic search, hybrid approaches, and AI\-enhanced ranking • Perform sophisticated relevance tuning leveraging BM25, TF\-IDF, vector similarity, and learning\-to\-rank methodologies

**AI and Agentic Search Innovation** • Prototype and productionize next\-generation search features including faceted navigation, autocomplete/type\-ahead, spell\-checking, vector search, and hybrid retrieval • Lead integration of AI\-powered conversational search, intelligent query understanding, and agentic workflows to enable natural\-language and multi\-turn search experiences • Architect and implement agentic AI frameworks (LangGraph, LangChain) for multi\-agent search workflows and intelligent content discovery

**Technical Leadership and Collaboration** • Partner with data scientists and ML engineers to deploy and optimize PyTorch\-based ranking models for query understanding, embeddings, and re\-ranking • Lead design and implementation of data pipelines (Python/Java/Spark/Dataflow) to generate training signals from user behavior analytics • Mentor and guide engineering teams on search best practices, performance optimization, and emerging AI technologies • Drive technical decision\-making across cross\-functional teams and stakeholder groups

**Quality and Operational Excellence** • Establish comprehensive metrics, alerting, and automated testing frameworks to guarantee SLA compliance at enterprise scale • Lead performance profiling and capacity planning for indexes serving hundreds of millions of documents or SKUs • Drive continuous improvement initiatives for search relevance, performance, and user experience metrics

 **Requirements**  

**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------

* **8\+ years** building enterprise\-scale back\-end systems in **Java** (Spring Boot or similar) with demonstrated focus on performance, scalability, and reliability
* **5\+ years** hands\-on leadership experience with **Lucene\-based search engines** (Apache Solr, Elasticsearch, or OpenSearch) including advanced index design, relevance tuning, and cluster operations
* **3\+ years** experience as technical lead on large\-scale search or platform modernization programs for enterprise clients
* Proven track record delivering **AI\-enhanced search solutions** handling 100M\+ documents/SKUs at Fortune\-1000 scale (e\-commerce, media, enterprise content, or similar)
* Deep understanding of information retrieval concepts including tokenization, analyzers, BM25, TF\-IDF, vector similarity, semantic search, and machine learning integration
* Strong proficiency in **Python** for data manipulation, ML model integration, and prototyping
* Extensive experience with cloud\-native architectures, Docker/Kubernetes, CI/CD, and enterprise deployment (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
* Demonstrated leadership in mentoring engineers and driving technical excellence across teams

 **Nice to have**  

**Preferred / Bonus Skills**
----------------------------

* Expert\-level understanding of Lucene\-based search engines and their underlying architecture, performance characteristics, and optimization strategies
* Hands\-on experience with modern search platform ecosystem including Algolia, Coveo, Lucidworks, Constructor.io, or Vertex AI Search
* Proven experience implementing **agentic AI frameworks** (LangGraph, LangChain) and orchestrating multi\-agent search workflows
* Advanced experience embedding and serving **PyTorch** models for Learning\-to\-Rank, embeddings, conversational AI, and generative re\-ranking
* Deep knowledge of vector databases and similarity search (OpenSearch/ES K\-NN, Milvus, Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma)
* Experience designing streaming data pipelines (Apache Kafka, Pub/Sub, Apache Flink) for real\-time indexing and personalization
* Active contributions to open\-source information retrieval/ML projects, published research, or recognized technical thought leadership
* Experience with cloud\-native search services (AWS CloudSearch, GCP Vertex AI Search, Azure Cognitive Search) and hybrid architectures
* Background in natural language processing, transformer models, and large language model integration
* **Technical marketing and thought leadership** experience including creating and publishing blog posts, white papers, presenting at professional conferences, and maintaining active presence on professional social media platforms

**Leadership and Soft Skills**
------------------------------

* Proven technical leader who can balance architectural vision with pragmatic delivery timelines
* Excellent communication skills for presenting complex technical concepts to C\-level executives, product stakeholders, and engineering teams
* Passionate advocate for engineering excellence, continuous learning, and staying current with search, ML, and AI agent technologies
* Strong collaborative mindset aligned with Grid Dynamics' co\-innovation model and client partnership approach
* Experience building and scaling high\-performing engineering teams in consulting or client services environments

 **We offer**  

* Opportunity to work on bleeding\-edge projects
* Work with a highly motivated and dedicated team
* Competitive salary
* Flexible schedule
* Benefits package \- medical insurance, sports
* Corporate social events
* Professional development opportunities
* Well\-equipped office


  

**About us**  

Grid Dynamics (NASDAQ: GDYN) is a leading provider of technology consulting, platform and product engineering, AI, and advanced analytics services. Fusing technical vision with business acumen, we solve the most pressing technical challenges and enable positive business outcomes for enterprise companies undergoing business transformation. A key differentiator for Grid Dynamics is our 8 years of experience and leadership in enterprise AI, supported by profound expertise and ongoing investment in data, analytics, cloud \& DevOps, application modernization and customer experience. Founded in 2006, Grid Dynamics is headquartered in Silicon Valley with offices across the Americas, Europe, and India.

title: Senior AI/ML Engineer
description:
**Role Overview:**

We are seeking a high\-calibre Technical Lead Manager to spearhead our AI development initiatives. You will be responsible for leading a high\-performing team of 10–12 AI developers and engineers, ensuring the successful delivery of complex machine learning solutions. This role is a hybrid of deep technical mentorship and strategic project management, requiring a leader who can bridge the gap between sophisticated AI research and real\-world customer needs.

**Core Responsibilities:**

1\. Technical Leadership \& Mentorship

* Provide architectural oversight and technical guidance for AI/ML projects (LLMs, Computer Vision, Predictive Analytics, etc.).
* Conduct code reviews and ensure best practices in model training, deployment, and scalability.
* Solve complex technical bottlenecks that the team encounters during the development lifecycle.

2\. Team \& Task Management

* Manage a multidisciplinary team of 10–12 AI developers, data scientists, and engineers.
* Oversee daily operations using Agile/Scrum methodologies, ensuring sprints stay on track.
* Handle performance evaluations, career development, and resource allocation.

3\. Customer Engagement \& Requirement Discovery

* Act as the primary technical point of contact for clients.
* Translate vague business problems into structured technical requirements.
* Lead Proof of Concept (PoC) initiatives to demonstrate value to stakeholders.

4\. End\-to\-End Delivery

* Take full ownership of the product lifecycle, from initial ideation to production deployment.
* Present high\-impact customer demos that showcase technical capabilities in a business\-centric way.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams (Product, Sales, DevOps) to ensure seamless delivery.

**Required Qualifications:**

* Experience: 8\+ years in software development, with at least 3\-4 years specifically in AI/ML and 2\+ years in a leadership/management role.
* AI Expertise: Strong understanding of machine learning frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow), MLOps, and the current Generative AI landscape.
* Familiarity with Python, APIs, and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
* Management Skills: Proven track record of managing teams of 10\+ members and delivering enterprise\-grade software.
* Communication: Exceptional ability to explain "the 'why' behind the AI" to non\-technical customers and executives.
* Education: Master’s or PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field (preferred).

**Key Performance Indicators (KPIs):**

* On\-time delivery of AI milestones and production deployments.
* Customer satisfaction scores following PoCs and Demos.
* Team retention and technical growth of direct reports.

Job Type: Full\-time

Pay: ₹2,500,000\.00 \- ₹3,000,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Provident Fund

Application Question(s):

* What is your current CTC ?
* What is your notice period ?

description:

**Experience:** 5\+ Years


**Location:** Chennai

**Job Summary:**


We are seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to design, develop, and deploy advanced AI/ML solutions, including agentic AI systems and traditional machine learning models, for the mortgage servicing and originations domain. This role involves building scalable, production\-ready ML models on Google Cloud Platform, applying classification techniques, model optimization, and tuning, and driving AI\-powered automation and decision\-making across business processes.

* Lead the design, development, training, and deployment of AI/ML models, including traditional ML and agentic AI systems.
* Develop classification, regression, and predictive models using structured and unstructured data.

* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to integrate AI/ML solutions into business applications.

* Contribute to MLOps practices, including CI/CD pipelines for ML model deployment.
* Document model architectures, workflows, and ensure adherence to data governance and security standards.
* Stay updated with advancements in machine learning, generative AI, and LLM technologies, applying best practices to enhance solutions.

* **Python** for ML model development
